footer.subscribeText: New products, restocks, and the occasional sale.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.notReservedNotice: Items in your cart are not reserved. You can enter a discount code on the payment page.

account.passwordUpdated: Password updated. Taking you to your account…
account.wishlistEmpty: Nothing saved yet. Tap the heart on any product to add it here.

checkout.confirmationEmail: A confirmation email is on its way. We'll let you know once it ships.

legal.placeholderNotice: This page is a placeholder. Replace the sections below with your actual {title} before launch.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service — Storefront
termsPage.acceptanceHint: What using this site or making a purchase means the customer agrees to.
termsPage.ordersHint: e.g. prices are re-verified server-side at checkout, when a charge is considered final, accepted payment methods.
termsPage.shippingHint: Reference your Shipping & Delivery page, or restate the key terms here.
termsPage.returnsHint: Reference your Returns Policy page, or restate the key terms here.
termsPage.ipHint: Ownership of site content, product images, and branding.
termsPage.liabilityHint: Standard liability disclaimers -- get real legal review for this section specifically.
termsPage.lawHint: Which jurisdiction's laws apply to disputes.
termsPage.contactHint: Who to contact with questions about these terms.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy — Storefront
privacyPage.collectHint: e.g. name, email, shipping address, payment details (handled by Stripe, never stored directly), browsing/cookie data.
privacyPage.useHint: e.g. processing orders, sending order updates, marketing emails (only if subscribed), improving the site.
privacyPage.shareHint: e.g. Stripe (payments), Resend (email), Supabase (hosting/database), shipping carriers.
privacyPage.cookiesHint: What cookies this site sets and why (e.g. cart contents, session).
privacyPage.rightsHint: How customers can request their data, ask for deletion, or opt out of marketing.
privacyPage.contactHint: Who to contact with privacy questions.

returnsPage.title: Returns Policy — Storefront
returnsPage.windowHint: e.g. how many days after delivery a customer can request a return.
returnsPage.eligibleHint: Condition requirements (unused, original packaging, etc.) and any non-returnable categories.
returnsPage.howToHint: The actual process -- e.g. contact support, use a self-serve portal, print a label.
returnsPage.refundHint: e.g. refunded to original payment method, how long it takes to process once received.
returnsPage.whoPaysHint: Customer-paid vs. free returns, and under what conditions.
returnsPage.exchangesHint: Whether exchanges are offered as an alternative to a refund.

contactPage.title: Contact — Storefront
contactPage.heading: Contact us for any enquiries or questions you may have
contactPage.body: Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

contactForm.success: Thanks — your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.genericError: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.

reviewForm.success: Thanks — your review will appear once it's approved.
reviewForm.emailNotPublished: Your email address will not be published.
reviewForm.genericError: Something went wrong submitting your review. Please try again.

newsletter.success: You're on the list — thanks for subscribing.
newsletter.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

checkoutErrors.itemUnavailable: One of the items in your cart is no longer available.
checkoutErrors.incompleteProfile: Please complete your profile (name, phone, date of birth, gender, and a billing address) before checking out.
checkoutErrors.couldNotStartCheckout: Could not start checkout. Please try again.

shippingPage.title: Shipping & Delivery — Storefront
shippingPage.heading: Shipping & Delivery
shippingPage.processingTimeBody: In-stock orders ship within 2–3 business days of purchase. You'll get an email confirmation as soon as your order is placed.
shippingPage.whereWeShipBody: We currently ship to Italy only. If your address is outside Italy, checkout won't be able to collect a shipping address for it yet.
shippingPage.shippingCostBody: Free shipping on orders over €75. Standard shipping rates apply below that threshold, calculated at checkout based on your address and order weight.
shippingPage.questionTitle: Have a question about your order?
shippingPage.questionBodyStart: Check your order status any time from

aboutPage.title: About Us — Storefront
aboutPage.heading: About Us
aboutPage.placeholderNotice: This page is a placeholder. Replace it with your real brand story before launch.
aboutPage.body: Write who you are, why the store exists, and what makes your products worth choosing -- founding story, values, sourcing, craftsmanship, whatever is true and specific to your brand.

faqPage.title: FAQ — Storefront
faqPage.heading: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.q1Question: How do I track my order?
faqPage.q1AnswerEnd: to see the status of anything you've purchased. You'll also get an email confirmation when your order is placed.
faqPage.q2Question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.q2Answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards through Stripe's secure checkout.
faqPage.q4Answer: Orders ship within 2–3 business days. Shipping is free on orders over €75.
faqPage.q5Question: Do I need an account to check out?
faqPage.q5Answer: No — guest checkout is available. Creating an account lets you track order history and save addresses for next time.

helpPage.title: Help — Storefront
helpPage.heading: How can we help?
helpPage.empty: Nothing here yet -- check back soon.
